en_title: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls Adds Carnage, Green Goblin, and Magneto to the Roster
cn_title: 《Marvel Tokon》新角色公布：屠杀、绿魔和万磁王参战
subtitle: 新角色三连发
opus_summary: 在索尼State of Play发布会上，Arc System Works公布了《Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls》三名新可玩角色：屠杀、绿魔和万磁王。他们将于2026年8月6日与毁灭博士一同加入“末日骑士”团队。游戏还将推出新舞台“纽约之夜”，并在Evo 2026提供试玩。本作将于2026年8月6日登陆PC和PS5。

paragraphs.en: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls showed up for the Sony State of Play June 2026 presentation with a first look at new playable characters Carnage, Green Goblin, and Magneto.
paragraphs.cn: 《Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls》在索尼2026年6月State of Play发布会上亮相，首次展示了新可玩角色屠杀、绿魔和万磁王。

paragraphs.en: Doctor Doom is one Marvel villain players have been looking forward to for some time. His three teammates, however, bring brand-new reveals, with footage shown during the presentation highlighting the different ways each can dismantle Iron Man, Storm, and Spider-Man, specifically.
paragraphs.cn: 毁灭博士是玩家期待已久的漫威反派之一。而他的三名队友则是全新亮相，发布会上展示的片段重点呈现了他们各自如何击败钢铁侠、暴风女和蜘蛛侠。

paragraphs.en: Gameplay for the roster additions revealed that the trio will be joining Knights of Doom team leader Doctor Doom when developer Arc System Works’ comic book fighting game launches August 6, 2026. You can see the gameplay reveal for Carnage, Green Goblin, and Magneto in Marvel Tokon below.
paragraphs.cn: 新增角色的实机演示显示，当开发商Arc System Works的这款漫画格斗游戏于2026年8月6日发售时，这三名角色将加入“末日骑士”团队领袖毁灭博士麾下。以下是屠杀、绿魔和万磁王在《Marvel Tokon》中的实机演示。

paragraphs.en: Marvel Tokon players started getting their hopes up for a Carnage reveal following a cleverly disguised teaser from a few weeks ago . It's for that reason that some may not be too caught off guard to see him join today, but aside from a few leaks and rumors, Magneto and Green Goblin present quite the surprise. The gameplay trailer also came with a sneak peek at a new stage: New York Night.
paragraphs.cn: 《Marvel Tokon》玩家在几周前看到一则巧妙伪装的预告后，就开始期待屠杀的亮相。正因如此，今天看到他加入可能不会让一些人感到太意外，但除了少量泄露和传闻外，万磁王和绿魔的出现则相当令人惊喜。实机预告片还抢先展示了新舞台「纽约之夜」。

paragraphs.en: Arc System Works showing gameplay for three new playable supervillains is undeniably the highlight of its presence at State of Play, but the footage came with a few other tidbits for fans to latch onto. You'd be forgiven for forgetting that the trailer landed its first punch with a first look at The Champion, for example. The key art featured at the end of the video is also new and comes courtesy of Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls main character artist Yuki Kato.
paragraphs.cn: Arc System Works展示三名新可玩超级反派的实机演示无疑是其在State of Play上亮相的亮点，但这段视频还包含了一些其他粉丝们可以关注的花絮。例如，如果你忘了预告片一开始就首次展示了「冠军」，那也情有可原。视频结尾的关键艺术图也是全新的，由《Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls》主要角色画师Yuki Kato绘制。

paragraphs.en: The Marvel Tokon team at Arc System Works took to the PlayStation.blog to confirm that, with the introduction of the Knights of Doom, only one superpowered team has yet to be revealed. Additionally, Evo 2026 attendees will be able to try a demo featuring Magneto and the new New York Night stage when the show comes to Las Vegas June 26, 2026.
paragraphs.cn: Arc System Works的《Marvel Tokon》团队在PlayStation.blog上确认，随着「末日骑士」的引入，目前仅剩一支超能力团队尚未揭晓。此外，2026年6月26日在拉斯维加斯举办的Evo 2026上，与会者将能试玩包含万磁王和新舞台「纽约之夜」的Demo。

paragraphs.en: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls has a release date of August 6, 2026 for PC and PlayStation 5. Here's everything announced at State of Play June 2026 if you need a catch-up on everything PlayStation had to show.
paragraphs.cn: 《Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls》将于2026年8月6日登陆PC和PS5。如果你想了解PlayStation在2026年6月State of Play上公布的所有内容，请点击这里。

audit_issues.detail: source contains 'Doom', but required dictionary translation '毁灭战士' is missing
